name: social-skills-marketplace
description: Patrick Debois' marketplace for social-skills — social-web skills for AI agents.

plugins.name: social-skills
plugins.description: Social-web skills for AI agents — fetch / search / ask / timeline / research across HN, Reddit, GitHub, X, LinkedIn, YouTube, Bluesky, arXiv, Medium, Substack, RSS, generic articles. Requires the `social-fetch` and (optional) `social-ledger` binaries on PATH (see plugin README).
